requestFail: An error occurred while sending your request, please try again later.
requestMessageInvitationMessage: This feature allows you to invite a user(s) with a custom message, and writing a message to all members.
requestTitleOfficialAgenda: Request to activate an official agenda
requestMessageOfficialAgenda: Please post at least one event on your agenda before your request for officialization.
requestMessageAgendaSchema: You need to add multiple fields to your form,, adapt their order or labels? Send us a short message
requestTitlePrivateAgenda: Request to activate a private agenda
requestMessagePrivateAgenda: This is a new feature, let us know more about your requirement:
requestMessageCustomFields:
Do you need to add custom fields to the event form of your agenda?

Or to link some events of your agenda with each other?

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
requestMessageAdvancedEmbed:
Do you need complete control over the presentation of your integrated agenda?

Template customization will give you the tools to define precisely what to display and where to display it.

Our team can also offer to integrate your agenda according to your requirements.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
requestTitlePublicAgenda: Request to activate a public agenda
requestTitleLimitDates: Add limits to the dates of contributed events
requestMessageLimitDates:
Limit contributions to predefined event dates. 

Interested by this feature? Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
requestMessageCustomMessage:
This feature allows you to customize messages sent to contributors when they are invited to contribute or when their event is published.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
requestMessageModerators:
Moderators are members that can edit the events of an agenda and change event states, without having access to agenda settings.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
requestTitleWriteToAll: Request to activate the "Write to them" function
requestMessageWriteToAll:
Send a message to all members of your agenda or target the ones that have not yet contributed.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
requestMessageAggregator: Automatically aggregate events that were published on other agendas. Request the activation of this feature, the first 365 aggregations are free
